testcase.name: ApiController > Correct session factory
ApiController > Create controller
ApiController > Resolve controller
ApiController > ApiController/actions > Register an action
ApiController > ApiController/actions > Re-registering action throws error
ApiController > ApiController/actions > Action schema is valid
ApiController > ApiController/actions > Action params validated
ApiController > ApiController/actions > Validate response
ApiController > ApiController/actions > Generate service schema
ApiController > ApiController/actions/auth > Optional Auth Action
ApiController > ApiController/actions/auth > Required Auth Action
ApiController > ApiController/actions/errors > Object Error converted to APIError
ApiController > ApiController/actions/errors > Regular error converted to APIError
ApiController > ApiController/actions/errors > APIError is thrown
ApiController > ApiController/actions/errors > Unknown APIError is thrown
ApiController > ApiController/actions/call > Moleculer context called
Load config
Error Helper Functions > notFoundError > should create NOT_FOUND error with resource name
Error Helper Functions > notFoundError > should create NOT_FOUND error with resource name and id
Error Helper Functions > conflictError > should create CONFLICT error with resource name
Error Helper Functions > conflictError > should create CONFLICT error with resource name and id
Error Helper Functions > forbiddenError > should create FORBIDDEN error with default message
Error Helper Functions > forbiddenError > should create FORBIDDEN error with custom message
Error Helper Functions > unauthorizedError > should create NOT_AUTHORIZED error with default message
Error Helper Functions > unauthorizedError > should create NOT_AUTHORIZED error with custom message
Error Helper Functions > tokenInvalidError > should create TOKEN_INVALID error
Error Helper Functions > tokenExpiredError > should create TOKEN_EXPIRED error
Error Helper Functions > validationError > should create BAD_REQUEST__INVALID_PARAMS error
Error Helper Functions > validationError > should include validation details
Error Helper Functions > badRequestError > should create BAD_REQUEST error
Error Helper Functions > internalError > should create INTERNAL_ERROR
Error Helper Functions > internalError > should append cause stack trace
Error Helper Functions > serviceUnavailableError > should create SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE error
Error Helper Functions > rateLimitError > should create TOO_MANY_REQUESTS error with retryAfter
Error Helper Functions > rateLimitError > should create TOO_MANY_REQUESTS error without retryAfter
Error Helper Functions > rateLimitError > should create TOO_MANY_REQUESTS error with custom message
Error Helper Functions > preconditionFailedError > should create PRECONDITION_FAILED error
Error Helper Functions > payloadTooLargeError > should create PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE error with max size
Error Helper Functions > payloadTooLargeError > should include actual size in message
Error Helper Functions > insufficientStorageError > should create INSUFFICIENT_STORAGE error
Error Helper Functions > notImplementedError > should create NOT_IMPLEMENTED error
Error Helper Functions > requestTimeoutError > should create REQUEST_TIMEOUT error
Error Helper Functions > gatewayTimeoutError > should create GATEWAY_TIMEOUT error
Moleculer Service > Has registered action
Moleculer Service > Action is called
Moleculer Service > Api Gate > Call get endpoint
Moleculer Service > Api Gate > Fail Call POST endpoint with wrong parameters
Moleculer Service > Api Gate > Get not found error on undefined action
OIDCError > constructor > should create error with oauth2Error and errorDescription
OIDCError > constructor > should inherit from Error
OIDCError > constructor > should accept optional redirectUri and state
OIDCError > constructor > should accept optional details
OIDCError > status > should return 400 for invalid_request
OIDCError > status > should return 401 for invalid_client
OIDCError > status > should return 401 for invalid_credentials
OIDCError > status > should return 403 for access_denied
OIDCError > status > should return 404 for user_not_found
OIDCError > status > should return 409 for email_exists
OIDCError > status > should return 429 for too_many_attempts
OIDCError > status > should return 500 for server_error
OIDCError > status > should return 503 for temporarily_unavailable
OIDCError > kind > should map invalid_request to InvalidArgument
OIDCError > kind > should map invalid_credentials to Unauthenticated
OIDCError > kind > should map too_many_attempts to ResourceExhausted
OIDCError > kind > should map email_not_verified to FailedPrecondition
OIDCError > kind > should map server_error to Internal
OIDCError > toOAuth2Response > should return OAuth2-compliant JSON
OIDCError > toRedirectUrl > should return null when no redirectUri
OIDCError > toRedirectUrl > should build redirect URL with error params
OIDCError > toRedirectUrl > should include state in redirect URL
OIDCError > shouldRedirect > should return true when redirectUri is set
OIDCError > shouldRedirect > should return false when redirectUri is not set
OIDCError > isOIDCError > should return true for OIDCError instances
OIDCError > isOIDCError > should return true for objects with __OIDC_ERROR__ marker
OIDCError > isOIDCError > should return false for regular Error
OIDCError > isOIDCError > should return false for non-errors
OIDCError > factory functions > oidcInvalidRequest should create invalid_request error
OIDCError > factory functions > oidcInvalidClient should create invalid_client error
OIDCError > factory functions > oidcInvalidGrant should create invalid_grant error
OIDCError > factory functions > oidcAccessDenied should create access_denied error
OIDCError > factory functions > oidcInvalidCredentials should create invalid_credentials error
OIDCError > factory functions > oidcTooManyAttempts should include retry time
OIDCError > factory functions > oidcTooManyAttempts without retry time
OIDCError > factory functions > oidcInvalidToken should create invalid_token error
OIDCError > factory functions > oidcServerError should create server_error
detectObjectType > Array Detection > should detect entity list from path
detectObjectType > Array Detection > should detect relationship list from path
detectObjectType > Array Detection > should detect community list from path
detectObjectType > Array Detection > should detect chunk list from path
detectObjectType > Array Detection > should default to list for unknown array path
detectObjectType > Object Type Detection > should detect query result
detectObjectType > Object Type Detection > should detect query analysis
detectObjectType > Object Type Detection > should detect entity
detectObjectType > Object Type Detection > should detect relationship
detectObjectType > Object Type Detection > should detect community
detectObjectType > Object Type Detection > should detect job status
detectObjectType > Object Type Detection > should detect stats
detectObjectType > Object Type Detection > should detect health
detectObjectType > Object Type Detection > should detect graph export
detectObjectType > Path-Based Detection > should detect query from path
detectObjectType > Path-Based Detection > should detect ingest job from path
detectObjectType > Path-Based Detection > should detect scheduler from path
detectObjectType > Path-Based Detection > should detect vector from path
getIdPrefix > should return correct prefix for query types
getIdPrefix > should return correct prefix for entity types
getIdPrefix > should return correct prefix for relationship types
getIdPrefix > should return correct prefix for community types
getIdPrefix > should return correct prefix for document types
getIdPrefix > should return correct prefix for job types
getIdPrefix > should return correct prefix for system types
getIdPrefix > should return lst for unknown types
wrapSuccessResponse > should wrap successful response
wrapSuccessResponse > should include usage info when present
wrapSuccessResponse > should include trace ID when present in meta
wrapSuccessResponse > should include legacy fields
wrapSuccessResponse > should use default tenant when not in meta
wrapErrorResponse > should wrap error response
wrapErrorResponse > should map response codes to error types
wrapErrorResponse > should detect retryable errors
wrapErrorResponse > should include retry_after for rate limit errors
wrapErrorResponse > should detect stage from path
wrapErrorResponse > should include legacy fields
wrapErrorResponse > should use error message when provided
buildResponsePayload > should include legacy fields when requested
buildResponsePayload > should exclude legacy fields when not requested
buildResponsePayload > should preserve main GertsResponse fields
OrchestraInfo Guards > isOrchestraInfo > should return true for valid OrchestraInfo
OrchestraInfo Guards > isOrchestraInfo > should return false for invalid types
OrchestraInfo Guards > isOrchestraInfo > should return false for invalid field types
OrchestraInfo Guards > assertOrchestraInfo > should not throw for valid OrchestraInfo
OrchestraInfo Guards > assertOrchestraInfo > should throw for invalid OrchestraInfo
OrchestraInfo Guards > getOrchestraInfo > should return value if valid
OrchestraInfo Guards > getOrchestraInfo > should return fallback for invalid value
TenantContextMeta Guards > isTenantContextMeta > should return true for valid context meta
TenantContextMeta Guards > isTenantContextMeta > should return false for non-objects
TenantContextMeta Guards > extractTenantId > should extract tenant ID from valid meta
TenantContextMeta Guards > extractTenantId > should return fallback for missing tenant ID
TenantContextMeta Guards > extractTenantId > should return fallback for empty tenant ID
TenantContextMeta Guards > extractTenantId > should return fallback for non-string tenant ID
TenantContextMeta Guards > extractTenantId > should return fallback for invalid meta
TenantContextMeta Guards > extractTraceId > should extract trace ID from valid meta
TenantContextMeta Guards > extractTraceId > should return undefined for missing trace ID
TenantContextMeta Guards > extractTraceId > should return undefined for empty trace ID
TenantContextMeta Guards > extractTraceId > should return undefined for invalid meta
UsageInfo Guards > isUsageInfo > should return true for valid UsageInfo
UsageInfo Guards > isUsageInfo > should return true for UsageInfo with optional fields
UsageInfo Guards > isUsageInfo > should return false for missing required fields
UsageInfo Guards > isUsageInfo > should return false for negative values
UsageInfo Guards > isUsageInfo > should return false for non-numeric values
UsageInfo Guards > isUsageInfo > should return false for invalid optional fields
UsageInfo Guards > extractUsageInfo > should extract usage from data.usage
UsageInfo Guards > extractUsageInfo > should extract usage from data._meta
UsageInfo Guards > extractUsageInfo > should return undefined for missing usage
UsageInfo Guards > extractUsageInfo > should return undefined for invalid data
UsageInfo Guards > extractUsageInfo > should return undefined for invalid usage object
PackageJson Guards > extractPackageInfo > should extract name and version from valid package.json
PackageJson Guards > extractPackageInfo > should return defaults for missing fields
PackageJson Guards > extractPackageInfo > should return defaults for non-string fields
PackageJson Guards > extractPackageInfo > should return defaults for invalid input
PackageJson Guards > extractPackageInfo > should handle partial package.json
Request Format Detection > wantsLegacyFormat > should return false for null/undefined request
Request Format Detection > wantsLegacyFormat > should return false for empty request
Request Format Detection > wantsLegacyFormat > should detect legacy format from query param
Request Format Detection > wantsLegacyFormat > should detect legacy format from query param array
Request Format Detection > wantsLegacyFormat > should detect legacy format from Accept header
Request Format Detection > wantsLegacyFormat > should detect legacy format from Accept header with multiple types
Request Format Detection > wantsLegacyFormat > should return false for standard Accept header
Request Format Detection > wantsLegacyFormat > should handle Accept header as array
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should accept valid alphanumeric tenant IDs
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should accept underscores and hyphens
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should accept single character tenant IDs
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should accept 64 character tenant IDs
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should reject empty string
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should reject null/undefined
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should reject IDs over 64 characters
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should reject special characters
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should reject CRLF injection attempts
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should reject null byte injection
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should reject Redis command injection
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > validateTenantIdFormat > should reject path traversal attempts
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > isTenantIdValid > should return true for valid tenant IDs
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > isTenantIdValid > should return false for invalid tenant IDs
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > TENANT_ID_REGEX > should match valid patterns
Tenant ID Validation (SEC-002) > TENANT_ID_REGEX > should not match invalid patterns
extractClientIp > X-Real-IP handling > should use X-Real-IP when present
extractClientIp > X-Real-IP handling > should trim X-Real-IP value
extractClientIp > X-Real-IP handling > should skip invalid X-Real-IP
extractClientIp > X-Forwarded-For handling (SEC-001) > should use LAST IP by default to prevent spoofing
extractClientIp > X-Forwarded-For handling (SEC-001) > should use first IP when configured for backwards compat
extractClientIp > X-Forwarded-For handling (SEC-001) > should handle single IP in X-Forwarded-For
extractClientIp > X-Forwarded-For handling (SEC-001) > should skip invalid IPs in chain
extractClientIp > socket fallback > should use socket IP when no proxy headers
extractClientIp > socket fallback > should strip IPv6-mapped IPv4 prefix
extractClientIp > socket fallback > should return unknown when no IP available
extractClientIp > configuration options > should skip X-Real-IP when not trusted
extractClientIp > configuration options > should skip X-Forwarded-For when not trusted
extractClientIp > configuration options > should fall back to socket when no headers trusted
isValidIpFormat > IPv4 validation > should accept valid IPv4
isValidIpFormat > IPv4 validation > should reject invalid IPv4 octets
isValidIpFormat > IPv6 validation > should accept valid IPv6
isValidIpFormat > injection prevention > should reject CRLF injection attempts
isValidIpFormat > injection prevention > should reject null byte injection
isValidIpFormat > injection prevention > should reject overly long strings
isValidIpFormat > injection prevention > should reject empty/null values
